summary: [MOCK SUMMARY] This is a placeholder summary generated in mock mode (USE_MOCK_LLM=true), standing in for a 100-150 word LLM-written summary of the contract's purpose, obligations, and risks. Set USE_MOCK_LLM=false and provide an ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to generate a real summary from the contract text.

excerpts: [MOCK] Either party may terminate this Agreement upon 30 days notice.
[MOCK] Each party shall keep Confidential Information secret.
